products.name: Heavy-Duty Industrial Stack Containers
products.shortDescription: Robust, stackable plastic containers designed for warehouse, logistics and automotive component handling.
products.longDescription:
Engineered for the rigours of industrial supply chains, our heavy-duty stack containers deliver outstanding load-bearing performance and dimensional stability across a wide temperature range.

Manufactured from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) with reinforced base and wall sections, these containers are built to withstand years of forklift and conveyor handling. Nestable and stackable configurations available to optimise your storage footprint.

seo.metaDescription: Heavy-duty stackable plastic containers for warehouse and automotive applications. HDPE, Euro-pallet compatible. UK manufacturer.

products.name: Pharmaceutical Blister Trays
products.shortDescription: Precision-formed blister trays and sterile barrier packaging for pharmaceutical and medical device applications.
products.longDescription:
Our pharmaceutical blister trays are formed to exacting tolerances for critical medical and pharmaceutical applications. Manufactured in a controlled environment from pharmaceutical-grade PVC, PETG and PP, they support both primary and secondary packaging configurations.

Each batch is traceable to raw material source and produced in compliance with GMP guidelines. Cleanroom manufacturing options available for Class II and Class III medical device packaging.

specifications.dimensions: Custom tooling, standard DIN formats available

seo.metaDescription: GMP-compliant pharmaceutical blister trays and sterile packaging. PVC, PETG, PP. UK manufacturer with full traceability.

products.name: Retail POS Blister Packs
products.shortDescription: High-clarity retail blister packs and clamshells that showcase your product and drive impulse purchase at point of sale.
products.longDescription:
First impressions matter at retail. Our high-clarity blister packs and clamshells are engineered to maximise product visibility, protect contents during transit, and comply with UK plastic packaging regulations.

Available in hang-hole, header-card, and full-enclosure configurations. Suitable for electronics accessories, hardware, cosmetics, and general consumer goods. Anti-tamper and child-resistant options available.

compliance: UK Plastic Packaging Tax exempt (30% recycled)

seo.metaTitle: Retail Blister Packs & Clamshells UK | SunnyPlaste
seo.metaDescription: High-clarity retail blister packs and clamshells for UK point of sale. PVC-free PET, MOQ 2,000. UK plastic packaging tax compliant.

products.name: Custom Bespoke Packaging
products.shortDescription: From concept to production — we design and manufacture fully bespoke plastic packaging to your exact specification.
products.longDescription:
Not every product fits a standard pack. Our in-house tooling and design team works with you from initial concept through prototype to full production, ensuring your bespoke packaging is both functional and commercially viable.

We offer 3D CAD design, rapid prototyping via CNC-machined or 3D-printed tooling samples, and a dedicated project manager throughout. Whether you need 500 units for a product launch or 500,000 for a national rollout, we scale with you.

specifications.material: Any thermoplastic: PET, PP, HDPE, PS, PVC-free options
compliance: Designed to meet your target compliance requirements

seo.metaTitle: Custom Bespoke Plastic Packaging UK | SunnyPlaste
seo.metaDescription: Fully bespoke plastic packaging design and manufacture. In-house tooling, CAD design, rapid prototyping. UK manufacturer. Get a quote.
